flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Citrus College rose 36% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Citrus College vs the 2004–2008 baseline (8.1k vs 10.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Citrus College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.8k → $10.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Citrus College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).
